title: The acceleration is here!
summary: Google's Co-scientist is an AI agent system that automates medical discovery and generates novel treatment approaches. The system demonstrates applications in finding treatments for cancer, antibiotic resistance, vision loss, and liver fibrosis by outperforming human expert predictions in some domains.
